keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY ERUCTATIONS. Eructations : Arg-n., Asar., Bell., Bry., Carb-v., Cocc., Con., Lyc., Merc., Nat-m., Nux-v., Saba., Sep., Sul., Ver-a. Eructations, abortive : Ars., Con., Grap. Eructations, acrid : Merc. Eructations, coughing , when : Amb., Kali-bi., Sang., Sul-ac., Ver-a. Eructations, eggs , like bad : Arn. Eructations, empty : Bry., Calc-c., Carb-v., Con., Grap., Pho., Sep., Sul. Eructations, frothy : Kre. Eructations, ingesta , tasting of : Ant-c., Bry., Pul. Eructations, loud , noisy : Arg-n., Asaf., Kali-bi., Petr., Pho. Eructations, nauseous , foul : Asaf., Carb-v., Pul., Sul. Eructations, rancid : Asaf., Carb-v. Eructations, relief , without : Chin., Lyc. Eructations, sour : Calc-c., Chin., Lyc., Mag-c., Nat-m., Nat-p., Nux-v., Pul., Sul. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
